items.name: JUMPSUITE OVERALL PBR COMMUNITY
items.description:
Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox Official Outfit

Outfit resmi komunitas PBR (Perkumpulan Bocil Roblox).
Dirancang sebagai jumpsuit komunitas supaya seluruh member tampil seragam, solid, dan beda saat event, party, atau foto bareng.

Mengusung gaya modernвҖ“skena Roblox, dengan kombinasi warna khas PBR dan detail simpel tapi standout.
Nyaman dipakai di berbagai avatar (R6 & R15) dan cocok untuk daily outfit komunitas.

Wajib dipakai saat event resmi PBR.

items.name: Black Sigil Destroy SV6 Katana
items.description:
Black Sigilism SV6 Katana вҖ” Roblox UGC katana that goes crazy. Black, chrome-sheen edge with gothic-distressed scars; looks like a cursed sigil welded to steel. Built for dark avatars: goth/emo/punk fits, ninja core, anime blades fans. Straight handle, light swing, spider-spine details for that tribal/cross vibe. Pairs with Black/Chrome accessories, Tribal marks, Ninja masks, Elite Rockstar outfits. Use it for combat, RP, thumbnails, or just flexing catalog drip.
